"'''Vader Tech'''" is an article by [[Abel G. Peña]] that appears in ''[[Vader: The Ultimate Guide]]''. It takes a detailed look into [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Darth Vader's armor/Legends|armor]] and his [[Starship/Legends|ships]].
